rules.summary: Sound-amplifying equipment must not be audible at 150 feet from the source in residential or commercial zones between 10:00 PM and 7:00 AM.
Powered equipment (including generators) prohibited between 10 PM and 7 AM in or within 500 feet of residential zones. Daytime limit: 75 dBA at 50 feet.
Construction activity (including set-building) prohibited 9 PM-7 AM weekdays, 6 PM-8 AM weekends.
Film permits can include noise ordinance variances, but conditions are typically imposed (e.g., no amplified sound after 10 PM in residential areas without specific approval).
Noise ordinance violation is a misdemeanor. Fine up to $1,000 and/or up to 6 months in jail per violation. Each day is a separate offense.
